name: Don't Flee
short_description: Don't Flee is a psychological horror thriller. Each new step can be the character's last. Your light is your life. Will the protagonist be able to overcome his fears and get out of the abandoned school by unraveling the cause of the incident...
detailed_description:
WELCOME TO DISCORD


About the Game

  • Don't Flee is a game that draws you into the gloomy atmosphere of an abandoned school, where every step you take opens the door to the unknown. Your only salvation is the light, which can be both your ally and traitor. Your task is to survive using only a flashlight and a night vision device, each of which has its own advantages and disadvantages. A flashlight will provide you with a long run time and powerful light, but its brightness can attract unwanted attention. Night vision will allow you to see what is hidden from view, but its short run time will force you to save every second.



  • The difficulty of the game lies in the fact that there is no right for you to make a mistake. Every step you take must be considered, because any carelessness can cost you your life. But don't be afraid to take risks - the game gives you a wide choice of actions, and every decision you make can lead to unexpected consequences.



  • Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of horror, where every sound and every light beam matters. "Don't Flee" is a challenge for the brave, a game that will make you rethink the meaning of fear. Are you ready to open the door to the unknown?
.
